comment: Synthetic TNBC metastatic, female 45 premenopausal, germline BRCA1 pathogenic. Prior: pembrolizumab + AC-T (KEYNOTE-522) neoadjuvant — residual disease → pembrolizumab adjuvant → distant relapse at 22 mo. HER2 IHC 0. Engine: ALGO-BREAST-TNBC-2L step 1 RF-BREAST-BRCA-GERMLINE-ACTIONABLE fires → IND-BREAST-TNBC-2L-BRCA-OLAPARIB (standard plan default; EMBRACA: mPFS 8.6 vs 5.6 mo). Talazoparib (IND-BREAST-TNBC-2L-BRCA-TALAZOPARIB) is aggressive/alternative plan — deeper hematologic suppression but once-daily oral. Used when olaparib GI toxicity intolerable or patient preference.

prior_lines: pembrolizumab + AC-paclitaxel (KEYNOTE-522) neoadjuvant + adjuvant pembrolizumab — relapse at 22 mo
